title: Manufacturing Engineer - Parle Products South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Parle Products South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Parle Products South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Parle Products South Asia Partners:
Parle Products South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products South Asia Partners!
